title: Student Conduct: Alcohol and Drug Use
description: Conroe ISD's rules on alcohol and drug use set clear expectations for student behavior and outline the consequences students may face if they possess, use, or distribute alcohol, drugs, or related paraphernalia on campus or at school events. The policy helps maintain a safe learning environment for all students. Parents and students should be familiar with these rules, as violations can result in serious disciplinary action, including removal from class or campus.
